rules: Use tracking-widest for ALL uppercase UI labels.
Never use Inter or generic sans. Strict adherence to technical/futuristic fonts.
Headings should have a text-shadow for a glowing effect, e.g., drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(34,211,238,0.6)].
All numeric data should be monospace to align vertically.

surfaces.modals: Retro-futurism (terminal look) with sharp corners, 1px solid borders, and glowing drop-shadows.
surfaces.background_effect: A CSS scanline overlay must be placed over the entire app. Use a fixed, pointer-events-none inset-0 div with bg-[linear-gradient(transparent_50%,rgba(0,0,0,0.25)_50%)] bg-[length:100%_4px] z-50 mix-blend-overlay.

layout_spacing.grid: Implement a subtle grid background on the main container to simulate an AR viewport: bg-[linear-gradient(to_right,#0891b215_1px,transparent_1px),linear-gradient(to_bottom,#0891b215_1px,transparent_1px)] bg-[size:3rem_3rem]
layout_spacing.padding: Generous spacing. p-8 or p-12 inside the diagnosis card to prevent crowding.
layout_spacing.structure: Flex column layout. Header at top, status bar below it, centered main content area, fixed absolute bottom banner.

header.instructions: Top navigation bar. Left: 'ARIA — X-Ray Vision Diagnostics'. Right: 'Metadome AI' + a small circular div with 'bg-green-400 animate-[ping_2s_cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1)_infinite]' and 'SYSTEM ACTIVE' text. Add a bottom border border-cyan-500/30.

vehicle_status_bar.instructions: Full width strip below header. Monospace font, text-xs, uppercase. Display: 'Vehicle: Tata Nexon EV 2024 | Active Faults: 3 | Battery Temp: 47°C ⚠️'. Use flex with gap-8 to space items. Add a subtle cyan background tint (bg-cyan-900/20) and a bottom border.

scan_button.instructions: Large circular button in the center of the screen. Dimensions: w-64 h-64 or similar. Border: 2px solid cyan-400 with glowing shadow. Text: '📷 Scan Component' (use Lucide Camera icon). On hover: scale up slightly, increase glow. Add 2-3 absolute positioned concentric rings (divs with border-t/border-b cyan-500/50 rounded-full) rotating at different speeds to look like a targeting reticle.

loading_state.instructions: When scan button is clicked, it transforms/hides and shows 'ARIA Analyzing Component...' text and a high-tech loader (e.g., a scanning laser sweeping up and down a box, or rotating concentric circles).

diagnosis_card.instructions: A sleek, tech-focused panel that appears after 2s of loading. Show Fault Code 'P0A93' in large red/cyan text. Use a bento-style CSS grid inside for Component ('DC-DC Converter'), Location ('Near drive motor, under hood'), Severity ('CRITICAL'). Include a prominent 'Safety Warning: HIGH VOLTAGE — Disconnect main service plug before inspection' section with a red background tint. Repair steps should be an ordered list.

critical_banner.instructions: Fixed at the bottom of the screen. '⚠️ HIGH VOLTAGE ZONE DETECTED — Supervisor Notified'. Background: red-600. Text: white, uppercase, tracking-widest, bold. Must flash (animate-pulse or custom keyframe flipping between dark red and bright red). Only show when the diagnosis card is visible.

motion_interactions.scan_sequence: 1. Click scan button. 2. Button transforms to loader. 3. Loader spins for 2s. 4. Diagnosis card fades in and slides up (using framer-motion).
motion_interactions.reticle_rotation: Use infinite slow rotation (animate-spin with custom slow duration) on the outer rings of the scan button.
motion_interactions.warning_flash: The bottom banner should blink heavily.

instructions_to_main_agent: Include <link href='https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Chakra+Petch:wght@400;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap' rel='stylesheet'> in index.html to load the futuristic fonts.
Set the global font-family for headings to 'Chakra Petch' and body to 'JetBrains Mono'.
Implement the 'scan component' flow using React state (status: 'idle' | 'scanning' | 'complete').
Ensure all text has adequate contrast against the dark background. Use text shadows to create a neon glow effect.
The UI must span 100vh and 100vw with overflow-hidden to act as a fixed HUD.
Use standard data-testid attributes on all interactive elements as specified in the components section.
Follow the Retro-futurism/Terminal look: no soft shadows, only glowing neon dropshadows, sharp corners or very minimal rounding (rounded-sm), visible grid layouts.
